# useFps

Reactive FPS (frames per second).

**Package:** `@vueuse/core`
**Category:** Sensors

## Usage

```ts
import { useFps } from '@vueuse/core'

const fps = useFps()
```

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| every | `number` | 10 | Calculate the FPS on every x frames. |

## Reference

[VueUse Docs](https://vueuse.org/core/useFps/)
